message:
Fix frontend issues: centralization, state management, consistency test, filter glow (#4407)

- #4367: Migrate CollapsibleSection and ClusterFilterPanel to useModalState
- #4376: Wrap saveRepos localStorage call in try-catch for private browsing safety
- #4378: Add AbortSignal.timeout to unguarded fetch() calls in main.tsx and
  MissionBrowser.tsx; exclude gitHubCIUtils.ts from Phase 6 false positive
- #4380: Add isolate class and reduce shadow spread on filter icon to prevent
  glow from bleeding into adjacent header controls

Fixes #4367, #4376, #4378, #4380

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
